rdf:Description.dc:description: Elevation-view schematic of the tripod suction-bucket foundation cross- section (manuscript Section 2.1). Shows one bucket (D = 8 m, L = 9.3 m skirt), the seabed with a 2 m example scour hole, the soil layer (Gunsan clay), and the water column above. Dimension arrows and callout labels anchor the geometry to the structural-parameters table (@tbl-structural-params).
